title: HalalPack
description:
This pack removes ALL haram elements from minecraft, and replaces them with halal alternatives like:
Potions -> Juice
Enchanting Table -> Upgrade table
Pork -> Notpork meat

And more!
body:
This pack removes ALL haram elements from minecraft, and replaces them with halal alternatives like:
Potions -> Juice
Enchanting Table -> Upgrade table
Pork -> Notpork meat

And more!

Would love all your support, I made this pack because there wasn't any other one like this, and I thought it was my duty to make one 🤷🏻
